package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodAcceptsDtoAndPersistenceModelTogether() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_accepts_dto_and_persistence_model_together"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Signatures that mix transport DTOs and GORM models in the same service API."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
